Alumni of Department of Mathematics List of Alumni Dr Neeraj Gandotra Dr. Neeraj Gandotra is working as Associate Professor in Faculty of Engineering and Technology, Shoolini University of Biotechnology and Management Sciences, Bajhol, Solan (H.P.) from 2010. Before that, he served Eternal University, Baru Sahib (H.P.) from 2007 to 2010. He received his M.Tech in Industrial Mathematics with Computer Applications from Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Solan (H.P.) in 2007. He also received his Ph.D. from Jaypee University of Information Technology , Waknaghat , Solan (H.P.) in 2014. His field of specialization is Fuzzy Information Measure, Image Processing, Decision Making and Pattern Recognition.  Currently he is guiding four Ph.D. students and also working as Chief Warden in Boys Hostels of Shoolini University, Solan (H.P.) Email: neerajgandotra@shooliniuniversity.com Dr Ashok Kumar Dr Ashok Kumar is working as Associate Professor at Chitkara University, Himachal Pradesh (India). After completing M.Sc (Mathematics) form HPU, he has obtained his M.Tech. (IMCA) from JUIT, Solan and  PhD from Chitkara University, Himachal Pradesh. With 15 years of teaching experience, he is currently teaching Mathematics to the undergraduate engineering students. His research interest includes Information Theory, Data Mining, Engineering Education and Waste Management. He has published 7 research manuscripts in various prestigious Journals and working on one DST approved project. Along with administrative experience, he is also experienced in organizing various International/National Conferences and workshops and has one student is pursuing PhD under his guidance. Email: ashok.kumar@chitkarauniversity.edu.in , thakurashok05@gmail.com ORCID Profile: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4299-626X Dr Manoj Gaur Dr. Manoj Gaur is working as an Assistant Professor in Department of Applied Sciences, Chitkara University Punjab. He earned his Ph.D (Mathematics) Degree from Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat Solan Himachal Pradesh in 2017. Prior to this he had done his M.Sc and B.Sc from Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal Central University, Srinagar Garhwal, Uttarakhand. He is NET-JRF, Gate and SET qualified. Further, he has worked as an Assistant Professor in School of Engineering, Symbiosis Skills and Open University Kiwale, Pune, Maharashtra, India. Dr. Gaur established a number of analytical results for nonlinear space and time fractional partial differential equations. He has also discussed group symmetries of nonlinear fractional coupled equations. His work has been published in various internationally reputed journals. Email: manoj.gaur@chitkara.edu.in Dr Tanuj Kumar Dr. Tanuj Kumar is working as an Assistant Professor in Department of Mathematics, SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Delhi NCR Campus, Ghaziabad (U.P.) from 2017. Prior to this he served Lovely Professional University, Phagwara (Pb) from 2015 to 2017. He received his M.Tech in Applied & Computational Mathematics from Jaypee Institute of Information Technology, Noida, UP in 2011. He also received his Ph.D. from Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Solan (H.P.) in 2015. His field of specialization is Fuzzy Information Measures & Statistics. Email: tanujkhutail@gmail.com Dr Madan Mohan Sati Dr. Madan Mohan Sati is working as an Assistant Professor in Department of Mathematics, Graphic Era Hill University, Bhimtal Campus, Nainital (Uttrakhand) from 2017. He received his M.Sc. in Applied Mathematics from Kumaun University, Nainital, Uttrakhand in 2008. He also received his Ph.D. from Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Solan (H.P.) in 2017. His field of specialization is Reliability theory, Information Measures and Probability and Statistics. Email: madan25mohansati@gmail.com Dr Meenakshi Chauhan Dr. Meenakshi Chauhan is currently working as a Senior Lecturer (Mathematics) in the Department of Mathematical Sciences, Sol Plaatje University (SPU), South Africa. Prior to joining SPU, she worked as a postdoctoral fellow at University of KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa, as an Assistant Professor & Head, Department of Mathematics, Bahra University, India and as a teaching assistant with Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), India. She earned Ph. D. in Mathematics from JUIT. She is the author of many research papers published in various journals/conferences. Her research area includes algebraic coding theory, information theory and error correcting codes. JUIT has a very thriving research environment and all the faculty members are very supportive. My overall experience at JUIT as a research scholar was amazing, intellectually stimulating and has been hugely formative in developing my career path. Email: meenakshi.chauhan27@gmail.com Dr Rajesh Kumar Gupta Dr. Rajesh Kumar Gupta is an Associate Professor of Mathematics at Central University of Haryana. He has more than 15 years of teaching and research experience at various prestigious institutes including Central University of Punjab, Bhatinda; Thapar University, Patiala; ITM University, Gurugram. He received his Ph.D. from Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Solan (H.P.) in 2007. He has published 72 research papers in reputed international journals including 45 SCI listed papers with total impact factor more than 100. He has supervised 10 Ph.D. theses and 12 M.Sc. theses. He has been selected for prestigious UGC Research Award for the period 2016-18. He is principle investigator of two major research projects of worth approximately 33 lakhs, sponsored by CSIR and NBHM. His research interests revolve around the applications of symmetry analysis to nonlinear partial differential equations governing important physical phenomena. He has worked on several nonlinear systems including variable coefficients KdV, Boussinesq, BBM and Broer-Kaup equations, coupled Higgs field equation, Hamiltonian amplitude equation, coupled Klein-Gordon- Schrödinger and some highly nonlinear Einstein field equations.
